---
title: "test_gungnir_calculus_v2.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/crucible/test_gungnir_calculus_v2.py"
loc: 90
complexity: 4
logic_score: 3.40
style_score: 3.88
intel_score: 4.96
overall_score: 4.71
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating TestGungnirCrucibleV2, setUp.

## Interaction Protocol
Import TestGungnirCrucibleV2 and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 14 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest](file://unittest)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.sentinel.coordinator](file://src.sentinel.coordinator)
- [src.cstar.core.antigravity_bridge](file://src.cstar.core.antigravity_bridge)

### Exports
- `TestGungnirCrucibleV2`
- `setUp`
- `test_calculus_10_metric_schema`
- `test_bridge_hybrid_decision_logic`
- `test_visual_mapping_fidelity`
